## 1818 Auctioneers

Heading into our third century of auctioneering, 1818 Auctioneers is a friendly auction house based at Junction 36 of the M6, which is easy to access from Cumbria, Lancashire and Yorkshire.
Our purpose-built offices and salerooms are part of the J36 Rural Auction Centre and they house a team of valuers and support staff
We hold online, timed auctions every week. Every auction is timed online, bidding and runs for 17 days.
In-person viewing takes place in the salerooms as follows:
Wednesdays,...
Heading into our third century of auctioneering, 1818 Auctioneers is a friendly auction house based at Junction 36 of the M6, which is easy to access from Cumbria, Lancashire and Yorkshire.

Our purpose-built offices and salerooms are part of the J36 Rural Auction Centre and they house a team of valuers and support staff

We hold online, timed auctions every week. Every auction is timed online, bidding and runs for 17 days.

In-person viewing takes place in the salerooms as follows:

Wednesdays, 10 am to 4 pm

Thursdays, 10 am to 4 pm

Fridays, 10 am to 4 pm

These are open viewing sessions.

Specialist knowledge

If you wish to make use of specialist knowledge of the lots while you view, here’s a quick guide to team availability:

Antiques, Vintage & Collectables – James Middleton or Freya Lomas Tuesday to Friday

Antique, Vintage & Later Furniture & Furnishings –Kevin Kendal Tuesday to Friday

Fine Pictures & Prints inc Lakes & Contemporary Art – Jasmine Vitoria is available most Tuesdays to Fridays

Figurines and Studies – James Middleton Tuesday to Friday

Toys, Fine Wine & Spirits – David Hunter is available most Mondays, Thursdays & Fridays

Medals, Arms and Militaria – Tony Godfree available Tuesdays

Coins and Banknotes – Ralph Sutton is available Tuesdays

Antique & Vintage Silver & Silver Plate, – Rowan Hughes Tuesday to Friday

Fine Antique & Vintage Jewellery and Watches, – Rowan Hughes Tuesday to Friday

Textiles – Bethan Thorsby is available most Tuesdays,

Musical Equipment –Kevin Kendal Tuesday & Wednesday

Vinyl & Hifi – Simon Norfolk by appointment

Books – Rob Kerr is available most Wednesday’s.

Fountain Pens and Writing Equipment, Automobilia – Bill Nelson is available Wednesday & Thursday

Cameras and Equipment – Liam Collins most Thursdays

You can find our full catalogues online, with new auctions launched every Thursday, and you are welcome to request condition reports for any lots of interest.
